headline: Add These 4 GARP Stocks to Your Portfolio to Receive Handsome Returns
summary: The GARP strategy helps investors gain exposure to stocks that have solid prospects and are trading at a discount. TPR, PAHC, ADSK and AMP are some such stocks.

headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Autodesk (ADSK). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?
